description: SOS response in KEGG style: DNA repair pathway, LexA/RecA, and LexA-regulated gene orthologs (eco:b) for recA, lexA, uvrA-D, recN, sulA, umuDC, dinB, dinI, polB, ruvA/B, ssb.
name: SOS Response (KEGG-sourced)
notes: V5 = KEGG only. DNA repair pathway and LexA regulon genes from KEGG GENES (eco) and pathway maps.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DAMAGE[DNA damage]
    LEXA[eco:b4043 lexA]
    RECA[eco:b2699 recA]
    DAMAGE -->|induces| RECA
    RECA -->|cleavage| LEXA
    LEXA -->|represses| RECA_G[eco:b2699 recA]
    LEXA -->|represses| LEXA_G[eco:b4043 lexA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRA[eco:b2698 uvrA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRB[eco:b0779 uvrB]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRC[eco:b2697 uvrC]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRD[eco:b3813 uvrD]
    LEXA -->|represses| RECN[eco:b2616 recN]
    LEXA -->|represses| SULA[eco:b0958 sulA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UMUDC[eco:b2612 umuDC]
    LEXA -->|represses| DINB[eco:b0231 dinB]
    LEXA -->|represses| DINI[eco:b1061 dinI]
    LEXA -->|represses| POLB[eco:b2300 polB]
    LEXA -->|represses| RUVA[eco:b1861 ruvA]
    LEXA -->|represses| RUVB[eco:b1860 ruvB]
    LEXA -->|represses| SSB[eco:b3855 ssb]
    style DAMAGE fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style LEXA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style RECA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style RECA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LEXA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRD fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RECN fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SULA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UMUDC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINI fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style POLB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SSB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: KEGG pathway and gene annotations for E. coli SOS; eco:b IDs from KEGG GENES.

sources.title: KEGG
sources.note: KEGG GENES (eco), DNA repair pathway, LexA regulon.
